zh.title: 艾达币/美元技术分析：短期横盘偏弱
zh.content:
当前艾达币价格位于 $0.238426，接近当天低点 $0.237416，短线表现偏弱。价格低于20日简单移动均线(SMA20 $0.24419485)，表明短期压力较大，市场多空力量趋于平衡但略偏空。短期趋势呈现横盘整理，投资者需关注关键支撑位。  

MACD指标显示为负值 $-0.0027387128，暗示下行动能略占优势，但未出现明显背离信号，行情仍有反弹可能。由于RSI数据缺失，超买超卖状态无法确认，因此短期操作应谨慎，避免追涨杀跌，优先观察趋势确认。  

支撑位初步关注 $0.2370-$0.2375 区间，一旦跌破，可能触及更低支撑 $0.2350。阻力位在 $0.2440 附近，突破难度较大，若能有效站稳，则短线反弹空间可达 $0.2470-$0.2480。价格波动区间相对狭窄，短线交易机会有限。  

交易建议上，当前适合区间操作为主，低位尝试小额布局，严格设置止损；追涨者需等待突破SMA20确认上行信号。中长期投资者可保持观望，待行情形成明确趋势后再考虑加仓，以降低不确定性带来的风险。

en.title: Cardano vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Cardano is trading at 0.238426, showing minimal movement over the last 24 hours with a marginal decline of 0.02%. Price action remains subdued and continues to trade below the 20-period simple moving average at 0.244195, indicating that short-term momentum favors sellers. The inability to reclaim the moving average suggests the market is still in a corrective phase, although the narrow daily range reflects reduced volatility and a temporary balance between buyers and sellers.

Technical indicators lean cautiously bearish. The MACD reading of -0.002739 remains below the neutral line, signaling negative momentum and confirming that downside pressure has not fully dissipated. While RSI data is unavailable, the combination of a negative MACD and price trading beneath the SMA(20) implies that bullish conviction remains limited. Traders should monitor for any MACD stabilization or bullish crossover, as this could provide an early indication that selling pressure is easing.

From a price structure perspective, immediate support is located near the session low around 0.2374. A decisive break below this area could expose additional downside toward the 0.2350 region. On the upside, the first resistance zone appears near 0.2400, followed by the more significant barrier at the SMA(20) around 0.2442. A sustained move above these levels would improve the technical outlook and could attract renewed buying interest.

For trading purposes, conservative participants may prefer to wait for confirmation of strength above 0.2400–0.2442 before considering bullish positions. More aggressive traders could look for short-term range opportunities between support and resistance while maintaining disciplined risk management. If support at 0.2374 fails, protective stops become increasingly important, as bearish momentum could accelerate. Until price reclaims the moving average, the broader short-term bias remains neutral-to-bearish.
